title: Tee off to support grassroot tennis players
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Rosemoor Tennis Centre has...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Rosemoor Tennis Centre has launched its supersized golf raffle, offering over R60 000’s worth of prizes.


> All the funds raised will be used to support the centre’s grassroots development programme.


The fundraiser, now live online, gives participants the chance to win one of four incredible golf getaway prizes, all while contributing to a cause that empowers young local tennis talent.

Among the prizes up for grabs are a two-night luxury stay for two at Fancourt, including one round of golf (excl. The Links), fourballs with carts at top Garden Route courses Oubaai, Knysna, Pezula and Simola, fourballs with carts at top coastal courses in PE, Plettenberg Bay and St Francis, and a two-night stay at Mes Amis Guest House in Wilderness.

“Instead of asking for sponsors, we’re giving you the chance to win,” says the centre’s Petrus Koekemoer.

“All the proceeds go towards growing our tennis centre and supporting development on and off the court.”


> With affordable entry, easy online access and exceptional prizes, it’s a win-win for everyone involved.


To enter, go to rosemoortenniscentrefundraiser.online/draw/win/ or scan the QR code.

You can also follow Rosemoor Tennis Centre on Facebook for updates.

Don’t miss your shot! Rally behind this worthy cause and swing for the win.

One of the prizes up for grabs is a two-night luxury stay for two at Fancourt, including one round of golf.‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
